speaker: Merry
text: // ============================================================ ⏎ //  CHAOS BUTTERFLY v1.0 ⏎ //  Lorenz strange attractor — volumetric density raymarch ⏎ //  Accumulated trajectory fog + neon palette + ACES ⏎ // ============================================================ ⏎  ⏎ const float PI  = 3.14159265359; ⏎ const float TAU = 6.28318530718; ⏎ const float speed      = 0.14; ⏎ const float brightness = 2.2; ⏎ const float density    = 0.18; ⏎ const float fogSharp   = 8.0; ⏎  ⏎ // ---- ACES ---- ⏎ vec3 ACESFilm(vec3 x) { ⏎     return clamp((x*(2.51*x+0.03))/(x*(2.43*x+0.59)+0.14),0.0,1.0); ⏎ } ⏎  ⏎ // ---- Palettes ---- ⏎ vec3 pal1(float t) { ⏎     vec3 a = vec3(0.5, 0.3, 0.6); ⏎     vec3 b = vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0.5); ⏎     vec3 c = vec3(1.0, 1.3, 0.9); ⏎     vec3 d = vec3(0.0, 0.25, 0.6); ⏎     return a + b * cos(TAU * (c * t + d)); ⏎ } ⏎ vec3 pal2(float t) { ⏎     vec3 a = vec3(0.4, 0.2, 0.5); ⏎     vec3 b = vec3(0.5, 0.5, 0.4); ⏎     vec3 c = vec3(2.1, 1.5, 0.8); ⏎     vec3 d = vec3(0.1, 0.4, 0.9); ⏎     return a + b * cos(TAU * (c * t + d)); ⏎ } ⏎ vec3 pal3(float t) { ⏎     vec3 a = vec3(0.6, 0.3, 0.2); ⏎     vec3 b = vec3(0.4, 0.5, 0.5); ⏎     vec3 c = vec3(0.5, 1.8, 2.0); ⏎     vec3 d = vec3(0.8, 0.1, 0.4); ⏎     return a + b * cos(TAU * (c * t + d)); ⏎ } ⏎  ⏎ // ---- Lorenz attractor step ---- ⏎ // sigma=10, rho=28, beta=8/3 — classic chaotic params ⏎ vec3 lorenzStep(vec3 p, float h) { ⏎     float sigma = 10.0; ⏎     float rho   = 28.0; ⏎     float beta  = 2.667; ⏎     vec3  dp; ⏎     dp.x = sigma * (p.y - p.x); ⏎     dp.y = p.x * (rho - p.z) - p.y; ⏎     dp.z = p.x * p.y - beta * p.z; ⏎     return p + dp * h; ⏎ } ⏎  ⏎ // ---- Thomas attractor (second chaotic system for layering) ---- ⏎ vec3 thomasStep(vec3 p, float h) { ⏎     float b  = 0.208; ⏎     vec3  dp; ⏎     dp.x = sin(p.y) - b * p.x; ⏎     dp.y = sin(p.z) - b * p.y; ⏎     dp.z = sin(p.x) - b * p.z; ⏎     return p + dp * h; ⏎ } ⏎  ⏎ // ---- Hash ---- ⏎ float hash11(float p) { ⏎     float q = fract(p * 0.1031); ⏎     q = q * q + 33.33; ⏎     q = q * q + q; ⏎     return fract(q); ⏎ } ⏎  ⏎ // ---- Sample attractor density at world point ---- ⏎ // Runs attractor from nearby seeds, accumulates closeness ⏎ float lorenzDensity(vec3 worldP, float t) { ⏎     // Scale world space to attractor space ⏎     vec3 ap = worldP * 4.5 + vec3(0.0, 0.0, -10.0); ⏎  ⏎     float dens = 0.0; ⏎  ⏎     // Run 6 trajectory seeds through the attractor ⏎     // Seeds start at different initial conditions ⏎     for(int seed = 0; seed < 6; seed++) { ⏎         float fs  = float(seed); ⏎         float h   = 0.003; ⏎  ⏎         // Seed position — slightly different initial conditions ⏎         vec3 pos = vec3( ⏎             0.1 + fs * 0.31, ⏎             0.0 + fs * 0.17, ⏎             0.0 + fs * 0.23 ⏎         ); ⏎  ⏎         // Warm up — iterate past transient ⏎         for(int w = 0; w < 60; w++) { ⏎             pos = lorenzStep(pos, h); ⏎         } ⏎  ⏎         // Offset by time — different seeds at different phases ⏎         float tPhase = t * 12.0 + fs * 8.0; ⏎         int   tSteps = int(mod(tPhase, 80.0)); ⏎         for(int w = 0; w < 80; w++) { ⏎             if(w >= tSteps) { break; } ⏎             pos = lorenzStep(pos, h); ⏎         } ⏎  ⏎         // Run trajectory and accumulate density near worldP ⏎         for(int i = 0; i < 80; i++) { ⏎             pos = lorenzStep(pos, h); ⏎             float d = length(ap - pos); ⏎             dens += density / (density + d * d * fogSharp); ⏎         } ⏎     } ⏎  ⏎     return dens / 6.0; ⏎ } ⏎  ⏎ float thomasDensity(vec3 worldP, float t) { ⏎     // Thomas lives in a different scale/offset ⏎     vec3 ap = worldP * 1.8; ⏎  ⏎     float dens = 0.0; ⏎  ⏎     for(int seed = 0; seed < 4; seed++) { ⏎         float fs  = float(seed); ⏎         float h   = 0.05; ⏎         vec3  pos = vec3( ⏎             0.1 + fs * 0.4, ⏎             0.4 + fs * 0.3, ⏎             0.0 + fs * 0.2 ⏎         ); ⏎  ⏎         for(int w = 0; w < 40; w++) { ⏎             pos = thomasStep(pos, h); ⏎         } ⏎  ⏎         float tPhase = t * 6.0 + fs * 5.0; ⏎         int   tSteps = int(mod(tPhase, 60.0)); ⏎         for(int w = 0; w < 60; w++) { ⏎             if(w >= tSteps) { break; } ⏎             pos = thomasStep(pos, h); ⏎         } ⏎  ⏎         for(int i = 0; i < 60; i++) { ⏎             pos = thomasStep(pos, h); ⏎             float d = length(ap - pos); ⏎             dens += density * 0.6 / (density + d * d * fogSharp * 0.4); ⏎         } ⏎     } ⏎  ⏎     return dens / 4.0; ⏎ } ⏎  ⏎ // ---- Rotation ---- ⏎ mat3 rotY(float a) { ⏎     float ca = cos(a); ⏎     float sa = sin(a); ⏎     return mat3(ca,0.0,sa, 0.0,1.0,0.0, -sa,0.0,ca); ⏎ } ⏎ mat3 rotX(float a) { ⏎     float ca = cos(a); ⏎     float sa = sin(a); ⏎     return mat3(1.0,0.0,0.0, 0.0,ca,-sa, 0.0,sa,ca); ⏎ } ⏎  ⏎ void mainImage(out vec4 fragColor, in vec2 fragCoord) { ⏎     vec2  uv = (fragCoord - 0.5 * iResolution.xy) / iResolution.y; ⏎     float t  = iTime * speed; ⏎  ⏎     // Slow cinematic orbit ⏎     float camA = t * 0.25; ⏎     float camB = sin(t * 0.17) * 0.4; ⏎     vec3  ro   = vec3(sin(camA) * 5.5, camB * 1.5 + 0.5, cos(camA) * 5.5); ⏎     vec3  tgt  = vec3(0.0, 0.2, 0.0); ⏎     vec3  fw   = normalize(tgt - ro); ⏎     vec3  rt   = normalize(cross(fw, vec3(0,1,0))); ⏎     vec3  up   = cross(rt, fw); ⏎     vec3  rd   = normalize(fw + uv.x * rt + uv.y * up); ⏎  ⏎     // Volume march through attractor density field ⏎     vec3  col     = vec3(0.0); ⏎     float transmit = 1.0; ⏎     float stepSz  = 0.12; ⏎     float d       = 0.2; ⏎  ⏎     for(int i = 0; i < 60; i++) { ⏎         vec3  p = ro + rd * d; ⏎  ⏎         // Sample both attractors ⏎         float ld = lorenzDensity(p, t); ⏎         float td = thomasDensity(p, t); ⏎  ⏎         // Lorenz: butterfly shape — drives main color ⏎         if(ld > 0.001) { ⏎             // Color varies by position in attractor space ⏎             vec3  ap      = p * 4.5; ⏎             float phase1  = ap.z / 25.0 + t * 0.04; ⏎             float phase2  = length(ap.xy) / 15.0 - t * 0.03; ⏎             float phase3  = atan(ap.y, ap.x) / TAU + t * 0.05; ⏎  ⏎             vec3  lCol    = pal1(phase1) * 0.6 ⏎                           + pal2(phase2) * 0.3 ⏎                           + pal3(phase3) * 0.1; ⏎  ⏎             float absorb  = ld * stepSz * 3.0; ⏎             col          += lCol * ld * transmit * stepSz * 8.0; ⏎             transmit     *= exp(-absorb); ⏎         } ⏎  ⏎         // Thomas: tangled cage — different palette layer ⏎         if(td > 0.001) { ⏎             vec3  ap2    = p * 1.8; ⏎             float phase4 = length(ap2) / 5.0 + t * 0.06; ⏎             vec3  tCol   = pal2(phase4 + 0.4) * 0.5 ⏎                          + pal3(phase4 * 0.7) * 0.5; ⏎  ⏎             float absorb  = td * stepSz * 2.0; ⏎             col          += tCol * td * transmit * stepSz * 5.0; ⏎             transmit     *= exp(-absorb); ⏎         } ⏎  ⏎         if(transmit < 0.01) { break; } ⏎         d += stepSz; ⏎         if(d > 10.0) { break; } ⏎     } ⏎  ⏎     // Faint star field background ⏎     vec2  starUV  = uv * 80.0 + vec2(t * 0.2, t * 0.1); ⏎     float starVal = hash11(floor(starUV.x) * 127.1 + floor(starUV.y) * 311.7); ⏎     float star    = step(0.985, starVal) * 0.4; ⏎     col += vec3(star); ⏎  ⏎     // Depth fog ⏎     col *= transmit * 0.1 + (1.0 - transmit); ⏎  ⏎     // ACES + gamma ⏎     col = ACESFilm(col * brightness); ⏎     col = pow(max(col, 0.0), vec3(0.4545)); ⏎  ⏎     // Vignette ⏎     col *= 1.0 - dot(uv * 0.9, uv * 0.9) * 0.5; ⏎  ⏎     fragColor = vec4(col, 1.0); ⏎ }
